name: mimobook
description: Simulation code and accompanying material for the textbook "Introduction to Multiple Antenna Communications and Reconfigurable Surfaces" by Emil Björnson and Özlem Tuğfe Demir, Boston-Delft: now publishers, 2024
description_ja: Emil Björnson および Özlem Tuğfe Demir 著、Boston-Delft: now publishers, 2024 の教科書「Introduction to Multiple Antenna Communications and Reconfigurable Surfaces」に対応するシミュレーションコードと付属資料。
